name: OPQ32r
description: The SHL Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 personality characteristics proven to influence work performance. It provides detailed insights into how aspects of an individual's behavioral style will affect their performance at work, helping to make better decisions about selection, development, team building, succession planning, and organizational change.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Verify Numerical Ability measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical data. It presents candidates with tables, graphs, and charts and asks them to answer questions based on statistical and numerical data. Ideal for roles requiring data interpretation and numerical reasoning.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability
description: Verify Verbal Ability assesses the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments. Candidates are presented with passages of text and asked to evaluate sets of statements based on the information given. Suitable for roles requiring strong verbal reasoning and comprehension skills.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Verify Inductive Reasoning measures the ability to draw inferences and understand relationships between various concepts independent of acquired knowledge. Candidates identify underlying rules and patterns in data. Ideal for roles requiring conceptual and analytical thinking.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Verify Deductive Reasoning measures the ability to apply rules to information to achieve a logical conclusion. It assesses how well candidates can draw conclusions from information available to them. Suitable for roles needing strong logical and analytical skills.

name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: Verify G+ is a comprehensive cognitive ability assessment combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning into a single test. It provides an overall measure of general mental ability and is ideal for volume hiring and initial screening across a wide range of roles and levels.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Verify Interactive Numerical Reasoning uses an engaging, interactive format to measure numerical reasoning ability. Features realistic workplace scenarios where candidates interact with data, making it harder to cheat and providing a more authentic assessment experience.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Verify Interactive Verbal Reasoning uses an engaging, interactive format to measure verbal reasoning ability. Features realistic workplace communications where candidates evaluate arguments and information, providing a more authentic assessment experience.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Verify Interactive Inductive Reasoning uses an engaging, interactive format to assess the ability to work with novel information and find solutions. Candidates identify patterns and rules in visual sequences through realistic, interactive scenarios.

name: MQ - Motivation Questionnaire
description: The Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) measures 18 dimensions of motivation that affect work performance. It identifies the conditions and situations that increase or decrease an individual's motivation at work, helping to optimize engagement and job satisfaction.

name: Graduate/Management Scenarios Test
description: Situational Judgment Test designed for graduate and management level selection. Presents realistic workplace scenarios and asks candidates to evaluate possible responses. Measures judgment, problem-solving, and decision-making in professional contexts.

name: Supervisory Scenarios Test
description: Situational Judgment Test for supervisory and first-line management roles. Presents work-related scenarios typical of supervisory positions and evaluates the quality of candidates' judgment and decision-making.

name: Customer Contact Scenarios Test
description: Situational Judgment Test designed for customer-facing roles. Assesses judgment and decision-making in customer service situations, measuring ability to handle customer interactions effectively and professionally.

name: Occupational English Test
description: Measures English language proficiency in occupational contexts. Assesses reading, writing, listening, and comprehension skills relevant to workplace communications. Suitable for roles where English language competency is critical.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Java 8 programming. Tests understanding of Java 8 features including lambda expressions, streams, functional interfaces, and core Java concepts. Suitable for Java developer selection.

name: Python (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Python programming. Tests understanding of Python syntax, data structures, object-oriented programming, libraries, and Pythonic coding practices. Suitable for Python developer selection.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for JavaScript programming. Tests understanding of JavaScript fundamentals, ES6+, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, and modern web development concepts.

name: C# (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for C# programming. Tests understanding of C# language features, .NET framework, object-oriented programming, LINQ, and software development principles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for C++ programming. Tests understanding of C++ language features, memory management, STL, object-oriented and generic programming concepts.

name: SQL (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for SQL. Tests understanding of SQL queries, database design, joins, aggregations, subqueries, and database management concepts. Suitable for database developer and data analyst selection.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for HTML and CSS. Tests understanding of HTML5, CSS3, responsive design, accessibility, and modern web layout techniques. Suitable for web developer and designer selection.

name: .NET Framework (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for .NET Framework development. Tests understanding of .NET architecture, ASP.NET, Web API, Entity Framework, and Microsoft development stack.

name: React (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for React.js development. Tests understanding of React components, hooks, state management, JSX, virtual DOM, and modern frontend development practices.

name: Angular (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Angular development. Tests understanding of Angular components, services, dependency injection, RxJS, TypeScript, and enterprise frontend development.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Node.js development. Tests understanding of Node.js runtime, Express.js, asynchronous programming, npm ecosystem, and server-side JavaScript development.

name: AWS (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Amazon Web Services. Tests understanding of core AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, IAM, VPC, and cloud architecture concepts.

name: Azure (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Microsoft Azure. Tests understanding of Azure services, virtual machines, Azure AD, storage, networking, and cloud architecture concepts.

name: Docker (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Docker containerization. Tests understanding of Docker containers, images, Dockerfile, Docker Compose, orchestration, and containerization concepts.

name: Git (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Git version control. Tests understanding of Git branching, merging, rebasing, workflows, and collaborative development practices.

name: Linux (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Linux administration. Tests understanding of Linux commands, file systems, permissions, shell scripting, networking, and system administration.

name: Agile Methodology (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for Agile software development methodology. Tests understanding of Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, user stories, retrospectives, and agile principles.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for DevOps practices. Tests understanding of CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, monitoring, automation, and DevOps culture and tools.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for data science. Tests understanding of statistical methods, machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, feature engineering, and data analysis techniques.

name: Cybersecurity (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for cybersecurity. Tests understanding of network security, encryption, threat analysis, security protocols, vulnerability assessment, and information security best practices.

name: Networking (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for computer networking. Tests understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, routing, switching, firewalls, and network administration concepts.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for manual software testing. Tests understanding of test planning, test case design, bug reporting, regression testing, and quality assurance methodologies.

name: Automation Testing (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for test automation. Tests understanding of Selenium, test frameworks, CI integration, test automation best practices, and automated testing strategies.

name: Salesforce (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Salesforce platform. Tests understanding of Salesforce CRM, Apex, Visualforce, Lightning, SOQL, and Salesforce administration and development.

name: SAP (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for SAP. Tests understanding of SAP modules, ABAP programming, SAP administration, and enterprise resource planning concepts.

name: Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of basic mechanical and physical principles. Assesses knowledge of concepts such as forces, pulleys, gears, levers, circuits, and fluid dynamics. Suitable for engineering, manufacturing, and technical roles.

name: Checking (SHL)
description: Measures the ability to check and verify information quickly and accurately. Tests attention to detail by asking candidates to compare and check data, codes, and sequences. Suitable for administrative and clerical roles.

name: Calculation (SHL)
description: Measures basic arithmetic calculation ability. Tests competence in addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentages, and fractions. Suitable for roles requiring numerical accuracy.

name: Numerical Reasoning
description: Traditional numerical reasoning test measuring the ability to understand and use numerical data presented in tables and charts. Tests data interpretation and mathematical reasoning ability.

name: Verbal Reasoning
description: Traditional verbal reasoning test measuring the ability to understand and evaluate written information. Tests comprehension, critical analysis, and logical thinking with text-based materials.

name: Basic IT Skills (New)
description: Assesses fundamental IT literacy including basic computer operations, office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), internet navigation, email, and file management. Suitable for general office roles.

name: Microsoft Excel (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Microsoft Excel. Tests understanding of formulas, functions, pivot tables, charts, data analysis, macros, and spreadsheet management.

name: Microsoft Word (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Microsoft Word. Tests understanding of document formatting, styles, templates, mail merge, tables, and word processing features.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Microsoft PowerPoint. Tests understanding of presentation design, slide layouts, animations, transitions, and presentation delivery features.

name: Numerical Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to understand and work with numerical information at a basic level. Covers basic arithmetic, percentages, ratios, and simple data interpretation. Suitable for entry-level and operational roles.

name: Verbal Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to understand and interpret written information at a basic level. Assesses reading comprehension and understanding of straightforward text. Suitable for entry-level and operational roles.

name: English Comprehension (New)
description: Assesses English language comprehension including grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and sentence construction. Suitable for roles requiring English communication skills, especially BPO and customer service.

name: Typing Speed Test
description: Measures typing speed and accuracy. Candidates type a given passage within a time limit, and their words per minute (WPM) and accuracy rate are calculated. Suitable for data entry and administrative roles.

name: Call Center Simulation
description: Interactive simulation of a call center environment. Assesses multitasking, customer service skills, problem-solving, and ability to handle multiple calls and queries simultaneously.

name: Coding Simulation - Java
description: Interactive coding assessment for Java. Candidates write actual Java code to solve programming problems in a real IDE environment. Tests practical coding ability, not just theoretical knowledge.

name: Coding Simulation - Python
description: Interactive coding assessment for Python. Candidates write actual Python code to solve programming problems in a real IDE environment. Tests practical coding ability and problem-solving.

name: Coding Simulation - C#
description: Interactive coding assessment for C#. Candidates write actual C# code to solve programming problems in a real IDE environment.

name: Coding Simulation - JavaScript
description: Interactive coding assessment for JavaScript. Candidates write actual JavaScript code to solve programming problems in a real IDE environment.

name: Coding Simulation - SQL
description: Interactive coding assessment for SQL. Candidates write SQL queries against a real database to solve data problems. Tests practical database querying ability.

name: Smart Interview - On Demand
description: AI-powered video interview assessment. Candidates record video responses to structured interview questions. Uses AI to analyze verbal content, delivery, and behavioral cues to provide objective candidate insights.

name: Smart Interview - Live
description: AI-enhanced live video interview platform. Supports real-time interviews with AI-powered note-taking, structured evaluation forms, and behavioral analysis to help interviewers make more objective decisions.

name: General Ability Screener (GSA)
description: Short cognitive ability screening test measuring general mental ability. Combines verbal, numerical, and logical reasoning in a brief format. Ideal for high-volume hiring and initial candidate screening.

name: Work Style Questionnaire
description: Measures work-related behavioral preferences and work styles. Shorter alternative to OPQ32r, focused on key behavioral dimensions most relevant to operational and entry-level roles.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Measures attitudes towards safety compliance and dependability at work. Assesses conscientiousness, rule-following, and safety awareness. Ideal for manufacturing, transportation, and safety-critical roles.

name: Customer Service Questionnaire
description: Personality questionnaire specifically designed for customer service roles. Measures traits essential for customer-facing positions including empathy, patience, communication orientation, and service motivation.

name: Sales Aptitude
description: Measures personality traits and behavioral tendencies associated with success in sales roles. Assesses competitiveness, persuasion, resilience, and customer orientation.

name: Remote Worker Assessment
description: Assesses suitability for remote and hybrid working arrangements. Measures self-discipline, communication in virtual settings, time management, and ability to work independently without direct supervision.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Comprehensive assessment of leadership potential and capabilities. Measures strategic thinking, people management, change leadership, results orientation, and executive presence.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability (Short)
description: Shortened version of Verify Numerical Ability for time-constrained assessment situations. Provides a reliable measure of numerical reasoning in less time.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability (Short)
description: Shortened version of Verify Verbal Ability for time-constrained assessment situations. Provides a reliable measure of verbal reasoning in less time.

name: Ruby (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Ruby programming. Tests understanding of Ruby syntax, object-oriented programming, Rails framework, and Ruby development practices.

name: PHP (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for PHP programming. Tests understanding of PHP syntax, Laravel, WordPress, server-side development, and web application development.

name: Swift (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Swift programming. Tests understanding of Swift syntax, iOS development, UIKit, SwiftUI, and Apple ecosystem development.

name: Kotlin (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Kotlin programming. Tests understanding of Kotlin syntax, Android development, coroutines, and JVM-based development.

name: TypeScript (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for TypeScript. Tests understanding of TypeScript type system, interfaces, generics, and modern typed JavaScript development.

name: R Programming (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for R programming. Tests understanding of R syntax, data manipulation, statistical analysis, data visualization, and R packages.

name: Scala (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Scala programming. Tests understanding of functional and object-oriented programming in Scala, JVM ecosystem, and concurrent programming.

name: Go (Golang) (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Go (Golang). Tests understanding of Go syntax, concurrency, goroutines, channels, and systems programming concepts.

name: Rust (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Rust programming. Tests understanding of Rust ownership model, memory safety, systems programming, and concurrent programming.

name: Spring Boot (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Spring Boot framework. Tests understanding of Spring Boot, dependency injection, Spring MVC, Spring Data, and Java enterprise development.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Kubernetes. Tests understanding of container orchestration, pods, services, deployments, scaling, and cloud-native architecture.

name: MongoDB (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for MongoDB. Tests understanding of NoSQL concepts, document databases, CRUD operations, aggregation pipeline, and MongoDB administration.

name: Power BI (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Microsoft Power BI. Tests understanding of data visualization, DAX, data modeling, dashboards, and business intelligence concepts.

name: Tableau (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Tableau. Tests understanding of data visualization, dashboard creation, calculated fields, and business intelligence analysis.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for machine learning. Tests understanding of ML algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, deep learning fundamentals, and practical ML applications.

name: Big Data (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for big data technologies. Tests understanding of Hadoop, Spark, distributed computing, data pipelines, and large-scale data processing.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for Android mobile app development. Tests understanding of Android SDK, activities, fragments, material design, and mobile development best practices.

name: iOS Development (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for iOS app development. Tests understanding of iOS SDK, Xcode, Auto Layout, Core Data, and Apple platform development.

name: REST API (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for REST API development. Tests understanding of HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, API design, and web services.

name: Microservices (New)
description: Technical knowledge assessment for microservices architecture. Tests understanding of service decomposition, API gateway, service mesh, event-driven architecture, and distributed systems.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for financial accounting. Tests understanding of financial statements, GAAP/IFRS, bookkeeping, journal entries, and accounting principles.

name: Business Analysis (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for business analysis. Tests understanding of requirements gathering, process modeling, stakeholder management, and business analysis methodologies.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for project management. Tests understanding of project planning, risk management, resource allocation, scheduling, and PM methodologies (PMP, PRINCE2).

name: Digital Marketing (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for digital marketing. Tests understanding of SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content marketing, email marketing, and digital analytics.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for human resources management. Tests understanding of HR policies, recruitment, performance management, compensation, and employment law basics.

name: Technical Support (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for technical support roles. Tests understanding of troubleshooting methodologies, hardware/software issues, ticketing systems, and customer communication.

name: Data Entry (New)
description: Assesses data entry speed and accuracy. Tests the ability to input alphanumeric data correctly and efficiently, including form filling and data transcription tasks.

name: Attention to Detail (New)
description: Measures the ability to identify errors, inconsistencies, and discrepancies in data and documents. Tests thoroughness and precision in reviewing information.

name: Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to mentally manipulate shapes and visualize objects from different perspectives. Tests spatial awareness and 3D visualization skills relevant to engineering and design roles.

name: Error Checking
description: Measures the ability to quickly and accurately identify errors in data. Candidates compare data sets and identify discrepancies. Ideal for roles requiring high accuracy in data handling.

name: Workplace English (New)
description: Assesses English language skills in workplace context. Tests business communication, email writing, report comprehension, and professional English usage.

name: Verbal Reasoning (AMCAT)
description: AMCAT verbal reasoning test measuring reading comprehension, grammar, vocabulary, and verbal logic. Popular for campus recruitment and entry-level hiring in India.

name: Quantitative Ability (AMCAT)
description: AMCAT quantitative ability test measuring numerical skills including algebra, geometry, data interpretation, and quantitative reasoning. Popular for campus recruitment.

name: Logical Ability (AMCAT)
description: AMCAT logical reasoning test measuring deductive and inductive reasoning, pattern recognition, and analytical thinking. Popular for campus and entry-level hiring.

name: Automata (Coding - AMCAT)
description: AMCAT coding assessment where candidates write code in their choice of programming language to solve algorithmic problems. Tests programming ability and problem-solving skills.

name: English (AMCAT)
description: AMCAT English language assessment testing grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and written communication. Popular for campus recruitment in India.

name: Personality Inventory (AMCAT)
description: AMCAT personality assessment measuring Big Five personality traits relevant to workplace performance. Provides insights into behavioral tendencies and work style preferences.

name: Accounts Payable (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for accounts payable processes. Tests understanding of invoice processing, vendor management, payment cycles, and accounts payable procedures.

name: Accounts Receivable (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for accounts receivable processes. Tests understanding of billing, collections, credit management, and receivable accounting procedures.

name: General Ledger (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for general ledger accounting. Tests understanding of journal entries, trial balance, financial reporting, reconciliation, and ledger management.

name: Insurance Domain (New)
description: Domain knowledge assessment for insurance industry. Tests understanding of insurance principles, policy types, claims processing, underwriting, and regulatory basics.

name: Banking Domain (New)
description: Domain knowledge assessment for banking industry. Tests understanding of banking operations, financial products, compliance, KYC, and banking regulations.

name: Healthcare Domain (New)
description: Domain knowledge assessment for healthcare industry. Tests understanding of healthcare terminologies, medical processes, patient care concepts, and healthcare regulations.

name: Retail Domain (New)
description: Domain knowledge assessment for retail industry. Tests understanding of retail operations, inventory management, merchandising, POS systems, and customer experience.

name: Telecom Domain (New)
description: Domain knowledge assessment for telecommunications industry. Tests understanding of telecom technologies, network types, protocols, and telecom business processes.

name: Supply Chain Management (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for supply chain management. Tests understanding of logistics, procurement, inventory management, demand planning, and supply chain optimization.

name: Content Writing (New)
description: Assesses content writing skills including grammar, creative writing, editing, content strategy, and ability to write engaging content for different formats and audiences.

name: Graphic Design (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for graphic design. Tests understanding of design principles, color theory, typography, layout, and familiarity with design tools like Adobe Creative Suite.

name: UI/UX Design (New)
description: Knowledge assessment for UI/UX design. Tests understanding of user research, wireframing, prototyping, usability principles, interaction design, and design thinking.

name: Entrepreneurial Potential
description: Assesses personality traits and behavioral tendencies associated with entrepreneurial success. Measures risk-taking, innovation, resilience, and business acumen.

name: Emotional Intelligence
description: Measures emotional intelligence competencies including self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, social skills, and emotional management in workplace contexts.

name: Team Fit Assessment
description: Assesses how well a candidate's working style and preferences fit with a specific team's dynamics and culture. Helps predict team performance and collaboration potential.

name: Graduate TalentLens
description: Comprehensive graduate assessment battery combining cognitive ability (numerical, verbal, abstract reasoning) with personality measures. Designed specifically for campus recruitment and graduate hiring programs.
